header: From sign-up to first published page
subheadline: A guided four-step onboarding that gets new teams live in their first week.

items.title: Connect your site
items.description: Point Desiderio at your domain and import existing pages. No code changes and nothing to install on your server.

items.title: Pick a starter theme
items.description: Choose a preset and adjust brand colours, fonts, and spacing once. Every block inherits the look automatically.

items.title: Build with content blocks
items.description: Assemble pages from ready-made sections, edit copy inline, and preview on real breakpoints before you ship.

items.title: Publish and measure
items.description: Go live in one click, then watch traffic and conversions per page so you know what to improve next.
